name: Occlusion Shell Swindle
description: Track a marked token through three shuffles and actively inspect the physical shuttle through each timed peephole.
natural_language: Track the marked token. When paired shells enter a cover, hold the cursor over its peephole and read the physical shuttle.

metadata.variant_count_kind: shell count, analytic paths, covers, transfer rounds, carriers, and stopping permutations
metadata.notes: Every under-cover carrier result is now human-observable through a timed cursor-held peephole. The grader binds shuttle engraving, port geometry, full frames, and final carrier history; missed ports have an explicit rewind path.
